title: Bridge Essay: Brain Networks Responsible for Sense of Agency: An EEG Study.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nested agency — voluntary action, free will as constructed experience, intentional binding.

**Brain Networks Responsible for Sense of Agency: An EEG Study.**. PLoS One.. PMID: 26270552. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pone.0135261. BACKGROUND: Self-agency (SA) is aperson'sfeeling that his action was generated by himself. The neural substrates of SA have been investigated in many neuroimaging studies, but the functional connectivity of identified regions has rarely been investigated. The goal of this study is to investigate the neural network related to SA. METHODS: SA of hand movements was modulated with virtual reality.
